_help: Weekly MSB / BOS is marked by hand (your call from the prototype).
When you confirm a structure event on a weekly CLOSE, set:
weeks -> how many weeks ago it printed (0 = this just-closed week)
Leave as {'type':'none','weeks':0} when there is no active event.
BOS decays to zero over 8 weeks; MSB over 2 weeks. Commit this file to update the dashboard.
